title: SunLooker
description: SunLooker is a Resource Pack that change appearance of sunflower making it look more suspicious
body:
🌻 **SunLooker** change appearance of _sunflower_ making it look more suspicious... did this thing just blink?

![sun?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ee8cd766c16838351d429a3fcc8df4d3d74878d.png)

👁️Living in the sunflower fields, **SunLookers** watch the players... _watching and waiting_
# 
Chenges:
- full texture of sunflower
- adds blinking animation

#
